transcript: The man rubbed the wire on the magnet to magnetize it, then put the lemon peel through the wire. The magnetized wire confloat on the surface of the liquid, making a simple compass. Tom used the compass to look for the location of the magnetic lock. The magnetized wire appeared to be deflected. Tom concluded that the mechanism is hidden in this location. He gently pressed the book and triggered the secret door mechanism. Tom used his eyes to signal Mike to take action. Mike instantly understood Tom's intention. He immediately lifted the gambling table to attract everyone's attention. Tom took the opportunity to enter the secret passage and quickly rushed to the underground vault. Found that the gangsters were counting the diamonds. Their mission this time is to stop the gangsters from trading weapons of mass destruction. The gangster walks into the elevator with the diamonds. So he uses an iron hook to hang onto the bottom of the elevator and follows it as it moves upwards. At this time, Mike is also shut down to Jenny's location. The two teamed up to knock out the guards and immediately came to meet up with his teammates.
